- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (`make lint` and `make typecheck` pass)
- [ ] Added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `Unreleased` if user-facing
- [ ] Updated or added an ADR if the architecture changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or proprietary data are committed
